basic_details.job_title: PAU Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 23 April 2026 on the official website https://pau.edu. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the PAU Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: B.Sc. (Agriculture) / B.Sc. Biotechnology (Plant Sciences) / B.Tech. Biotechnology. M.Sc. in Plant Breeding & Genetics / M.Sc. Biotechnology. At least first division at Bachelor’s level and 65% marks or 6.50 out of 10.00 at Master’s level. Matriculation level certificate of Punjabi language from Punjab School Education Board or any other recognized Board (as first or second language). Note: Candidates with Ph.D. in a relevant discipline are eligible even without a Master's degree.

salary_details.details: Rs. 35000/- p.m. (for M.Sc. holders) Rs. 40000/- p.m. (for Ph.D. holders) - fixed

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://pau.edu.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 11-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PAU Research Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the PAU Research Assistant position is 11th May 2026. Candidates are advised to ensure their applications reach the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a B.Sc. in Agriculture, Biotechnology (Plant Sciences), or B.Tech. in Biotechnology. Additionally, an M.Sc. in Plant Breeding & Genetics or Biotechnology is required, with specific marks criteria at both Bachelor's and Master's levels. A Punjabi language certificate at the Matric level is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Research Assistant post ranges from Rs. 35,000/- per month for those with an M.Sc. degree to Rs. 40,000/- per month for those holding a Ph.D. degree in the relevant discipline.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Assistant post in the Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the General/OBC category?
faq.answer: The application fee for candidates belonging to the General and OBC categories is Rs. 200/-.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly mention age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for any specific information regarding age relaxation.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Assistant position will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted and called for an interview based on their qualifications and application.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Punjab Agricultural University (PAU), which is https://pau.edu.

faq.question: Q10. What documents need to be submitted along with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents, including photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates, along with the filled application form.
